title: Attorney fees
doc_html:
§359.12.  Attorney fees

The court may award attorney fees and costs when either party causes unreasonable delays, fails to provide information required in this Subpart, or in any other circumstance in which the court considers it to be appropriate.

Acts 2010, No. 739, §1.
